decisions.name: Use Client-Server Architecture
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of enabling real-time collaboration and handling multiple users, a client-server architecture is the most suitable choice.

decisions.name: Implement Gesture Recognition
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of including gesture recognition, we will implement a gesture recognition system using machine learning algorithms.

decisions.name: Use YOLOv5 Model for Face Detection
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of detecting the user's face using the YOLOv5 model, we will integrate the YOLOv5 model into our system.

decisions.name: Use Background Subtraction for Moving Parts Detection
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of separating the moving parts from the background using Background Subtraction (BS), we will implement a background subtraction algorithm.

decisions.name: Use Histogram Equalization for Image Contrast Optimization
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of optimizing the image contrast using Histogram Equalization, we will implement a histogram equalization algorithm.

decisions.name: Use Threading for Concurrent Execution
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of enabling concurrent execution of tasks within a single process using threading, we will implement a threading system.

decisions.name: Use Multiprocessing for Parallel Execution
decisions.rationale: To meet the functional requirement of enabling parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes using multiprocessing, we will implement a multiprocessing system.

decisions.name: Implement User-Friendly Interface
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirement of providing a user-friendly interface, we will design a user-friendly interface that is easy to use and navigate.

decisions.name: Implement Real-Time Feedback System
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirement of providing real-time feedback to the user, we will implement a real-time feedback system that provides immediate feedback to the user.

decisions.name: Implement Error Handling and Exception Handling
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirement of handling errors and exceptions, we will implement a robust error handling and exception handling system.

decisions.name: Implement Security Features
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirement of providing security features, we will implement a robust security system that protects user data and prevents unauthorized access.

decisions.name: Implement Scalability Features
decisions.rationale: To meet the non-functional requirement of providing scalability, we will implement a scalable system that can handle large amounts of data and multiple users.

components.name: Gesture Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Analyze gestures and reflect the corresponding action on the projected surface.

components.name: Face Recognition Module
components.responsibility: Detect the user's face using the YOLOv5 model.

components.name: Single-Hand Interaction Module
components.responsibility: Enable single-hand interaction with the projected surface.

components.name: Customization Module
components.responsibility: Customize the actions for specific gestures.

components.name: Real-Time Collaboration Module
components.responsibility: Enable real-time collaboration by supporting interactions on the projected surface.

components.name: Image Processing Module
responsibility: Detect the borders of objects using contours detection.
Mute the image noise using Gaussian blur.
Separate the moving parts from the background using Background Subtraction (BS).
Optimize the image contrast using Histogram Equalization.

components.name: Background Subtraction Module
components.responsibility: Separate the moving parts from the background using Background Subtraction (BS).

components.name: Threading Module
components.responsibility: Enable concurrent execution of tasks within a single process using threading.

components.name: Multiprocessing Module
components.responsibility: Enable parallel execution of tasks across multiple processes using multiprocessing.

critique.description: Missing relationship between Face Recognition Module and Gesture Recognition Module.
Missing relationship between Image Processing Module and Background Subtraction Module.
